answers.where: Battle arena on a Roblox-like studs/baseplate world with the sourced Assault Walker engaging drones.
answers.action: Move with WASD while the Assault Walker fires at nearby drones.
answers.response: The battle camera is calmer, foreground pylons are less intrusive, and stomp/weapon VFX are tuned down so the sourced mech silhouette reads more clearly.
answers.reward: The player can keep fighting drones for salvage and return to the hangar to improve the mech.
answers.game_look: Bright toy-block arena, imported mech/robot models, colored studs, lighting, shadows, VFX, and readable HUD make it look like a casual Roblox-like mech battler.

issues.text: Combat clarity improved by camera/pylon/VFX tuning, but final answer still needs authored/kitbashed limb articulation and richer sourced textures.
